To us, the meaning of \"family\" has never been confined to blood ties. Those silent, furry companions-whether a cat or a dog-are also cherished members of life deserving of gentle care. Thus, we believe that the significance of innovation lies not only in facilitating human life but also in nurturing every living being.
Rooted in the rich soil of traditional home essentials, we have now stepped into a new phase of smart appliances. Through the interconnected fabric of the Internet of Things, we seamlessly link household devices, striving to create a smarter, more eco-friendly, and higher-quality living experience for all family members-whether they walk on two legs or four.
From robotic vacuums and air purifiers to automatic cat litter boxes and pet water dispensers, we are putting this belief into practice. All these efforts are dedicated to a single goal: enabling every household to embrace a smarter, greener, and warmer
